recommendations.title: Leprechaun Returns
recommendations.overview: A group of unwitting sorority sisters accidentally awaken the serial-killing Leprechaun after they build a sorority house on his hunting grounds.

recommendations.title: Melancholia
recommendations.overview: Two sisters find their already strained relationship challenged as a mysterious new planet threatens to collide with Earth.

recommendations.title: Life in a Year
recommendations.overview: A 17 year old finds out that his girlfriend is dying, so he sets out to give her an entire life, in the last year she has left.

recommendations.title: My Blind Brother
recommendations.overview: Love for the same woman causes conflict between an over-achieving blind athlete and the brother who made him that way.

recommendations.title: The Miracle
recommendations.overview: 1960s Turkey countryside. A newly assigned teacher finds out that the solitary village is missing a school. He gets fond of the village people and especially a disabled man. The teacher helps the village to build a new school and educate the children

recommendations.title: Franklyn
recommendations.overview: Set between the parallel worlds of contemporary London and the futuristic faith dominated metropolis of Meanwhile City, Franklyn weaves a tale of four souls, whose lives are intertwined by fate, romance and tragedy. As these worlds collide, a single

recommendations.title: Notting Hill
recommendations.overview: London bookstore owner William Thacker's quiet life turns upside down when a chance encounter with famous actress Anna Scott sparks an unlikely romance challenged by their vastly different worlds.

recommendations.title: The House on Sorority Row
recommendations.overview: When the senior sorority sisters of Theta Pi decide to do in their demented house mother, someone seeks revenge, and begins a night of terror and madness.

recommendations.title: Neighbors 2: Sorority Rising
recommendations.overview: A sorority moves in next door to the home of Mac and Kelly Radner who have a young child. The Radner's enlist their former nemeses from the fraternity to help battle the raucous sisters.

recommendations.title: Sorority Wars
recommendations.overview: Katie, a college freshman, has been groomed from birth to continue her mother’s legacy with the Deltas. When Katie decides to pledge another house instead, an all-out sorority war commences.
